def parse_csv_line(line, delimiter=","):
    fields = []
    current = ""
    in_quotes = False
    for char in line:
        if char == '"':
            in_quotes = not in_quotes
        elif char == delimiter and not in_quotes:
            fields.append(current.strip())
            current = ""
        else:
            current += char
    fields.append(current.strip())
    return fields


def format_csv_line(fields, delimiter=","):
    escaped = []
    for field in fields:
        if delimiter in str(field) or '"' in str(field):
            escaped.append(f'"{str(field).replace(chr(34), chr(34)+chr(34))}"')
        else:
            escaped.append(str(field))
    return delimiter.join(escaped)
